title: Attention, Calculated
tagline: How Transformers figure out which words care about each other
summary: Pick an ambiguous sentence, drag the query and key arrows, and watch dot products, softmax, and value blending update live to produce one contextual meaning.
highlights: Switch between five ambiguous sentences (bank, apple, bass) and see attention disambiguate each one.
Drag query, key, and value vectors on two live 2-D canvases; every number in the tables recomputes.
Watch the softmax, the per-word percentages, and the final blended value vector update in live KaTeX.
